enriched_points.expanded_content: Limited sample sizes, often ≤10, can bias results and affect the credibility of prosthetics research, as highlighted in multiple studies.
Research may be skewed due to a predominance of younger professionals or specific demographics, leading to inaccurate or non-representative outcomes.
Findings may not be applicable to broader populations, limiting the effectiveness of interventions across diverse groups of prosthetic users.
